---
title: "Overview"
---

We will focus **Day 2** on advanced AI features that enrich context and mitigate hallucinations:

- 🛠️ **MCP** — Model Context Protocol
- 🔧 **Tools** — connect LLMs to your file system, APIs, applications, databases, and the Internet.
- 📝 **Prompt files** and **custom instructions** — pre-load specific context and steer or template LLM responses.
- 🗺️ **Plan mode** — break down complex tasks into smaller steps, discuss implementation with the LLM, and execute an actionable plan.
- 🧩 **Skills** — knowledge that AI plugs into context when it encounters a specific problem.
- 🤖 **Agents** — AI-driven programs that autonomously execute tasks by orchestrating tools, skills, and APIs sequentially.

**Session goals:**

- Address questions from the self-study period.

  - Please do share your questions and experiences in the Teams chat a day
    before the session to help guide the discussion and practice exercises.

- Learn "Plan mode" to execute complex, multi-step tasks with an AI agent.

- Context engineering and optimization with Copilot: `#tools`, `skills`,
  `/prompts`, `/agents`, `MCP` connectors, and other relevant features.

- Customizing your Positron's assistant with out-of-the-box `skills`, and agents.

By the end of this session you should be able to delegate a complex analytical
task to an AI agent, supervise its execution, and course-correct when it goes
off track using appropriate tools and prompting techniques.

## Agenda

<!-- Day 2: Advanced AI features

| Time        | Topic |
|-------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| 9:00-9:10   | 1. [Welcome and course overview (slides)](#welcome) |
| 9:10-9:40   | 2. [Setup overview (slides)](#setup-overview). |
| 9:40-10:20  | 3. Live: [Self-Study > Example 0](/selfstudy/example-0.qmd) |
| 10:20-10:30 | ☕ Break (10 min) |
| 10:30-10:50 | 4. [Core AI-related concepts](#ai-concepts) |
| 10:50-11:00 | 5. [Common workflows and data safeguarding (slides)](#ai-workflow) |
| 11:00-11:30 | 6. [Example 2: Understanding data with AI (live)](#example-2) |

Self-study:

-  [Example 1](/selfstudy/example-1.qmd)
-  [Example 3](/selfstudy/example-3.qmd) -->

## Before You Arrive

Post your questions, challenges, and discoveries from the self-study exercises
in the Teams chat a day before the session to help guide the discussion and
practice exercises.
